title: Object Types, Interfaces, Aliases, and Structural Compatibility · Guided Contract Studio
summary: Design public service records that evolve without silently accepting misspelled, mutable, or incompatible fields. Planned artifact: Build a complete first version of an evolvable service-record contract library while every earlier competency remains active. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Model required, optional, readonly, indexed, and exact-optional property behavior under strict configuration.
Choose interface or type alias from extension, unions, declaration merging, diagnostics, and API intent.
Predict structural assignability while identifying where extra members, methods, and variance create risk.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
